Used libraries:

CLI11 2.4.2 — BSD-3-Clause — https://github.com/CLIUtils/CLI11
Crow 3.1 — BSD-3-Clause — https://github.com/CrowCpp/Crow
nlohmann/json 3.12.0 — MIT — https://github.com/nlohmann/json
PocketPy 2.1.6 — MIT — https://github.com/pocketpy/pocketpy
Quill 8.x — MIT — https://github.com/odygrd/quill
stb_image 2.30 — Public Domain — https://github.com/nothings/stb
stb_image_write 1.16 — Public Domain — https://github.com/nothings/stb
